metadata.description: SAP on Azure SRE Agent — tiered skill plugins for SAP HANA and NetWeaver operations, monitoring, root-cause analysis, and STAF configuration compliance.

plugins.name: sap-sre-core
plugins.description: 10 Azure-native SAP SRE skills (landscape discovery, operational health, cost analysis, trend analysis, resiliency assessment, deployment readiness, incident RCA, performance diagnostics, HA cluster health, maintenance handler). No extra infrastructure — uses Azure APIs and AMS telemetry only.

plugins.name: sap-sre-config
plugins.description: STAF configuration validation for SAP. Fetches STAF check definitions from Azure/sap-automation-qa at runtime and compares them against collected VM configs. Requires a customer Storage Account (config store).

plugins.name: sap-sre-proxy-ops
plugins.description: Live read-only VM command execution and guard-railed self-healing remediation via a brokered command proxy. Requires the MCP command proxy (Container App) and custom RBAC.
